name: KKLT moduli stabilisation
aliases: metastable de Sitter from string flux
summary: Constructs metastable de Sitter vacua in type IIB string theory by combining: (i) flux compactifications that fix all complex-structure moduli and the dilaton, (ii) non-perturbative effects (Euclidean D3-instantons or gaugino condensation on D7s) that fix the Kahler modulus into a supersymmetric AdS vacuum, (iii) anti-D3 branes at the tip of a warped throat that uplift the AdS vacuum to a metastable dS vacuum. Provides the explicit string-landscape backbone for anthropic explanations of Lambda.

addresses_puzzles.note: KKLT-type constructions populate the string landscape with ~10^500 metastable dS vacua spanning a near-continuum of Lambda values; combined with eternal inflation + anthropic selection, this is the canonical answer for why Lambda lands in the meV-scale window. Status `contested` because de-Sitter swampland conjectures (Obied-Ooguri-Spodyneiko-Vafa 2018) challenge the construction's existence; counter-arguments persist.

KKLT provides the UV completion in which inflationary scenarios (including eternal inflation populating the landscape) become well-defined; specific inflaton constructions (KKLMMT 2003) sit inside the framework.

Vacuum selection from a finite (but large) set of flux choices and non-perturbative stabilisations; parameters become geometric and discrete rather than continuous (Kachru-Kallosh-Linde-Trivedi 2003).

introduces.note: Flux quantum numbers (discrete), warped-throat geometry, instanton-correction scale, uplift parameter. The discrete flux landscape gives the large vacuum count.

history: Kachru, Kallosh, Linde, Trivedi (2003), 'de Sitter vacua in string theory', Phys. Rev. D 68, 046005, arXiv:hep-th/0301240. KKLMMT 2003 (Kachru-Kallosh-Linde-Maldacena-McAllister-Trivedi, arXiv:hep-th/0308055) provided the explicit brane-inflation embedding. The construction underlies modern landscape phenomenology; under sustained challenge from the swampland program (Obied-Ooguri-Spodyneiko-Vafa 2018) and Bena-Grana-Kovensky-Retolaza-style critiques.

references.citation: Kachru, Kallosh, Linde, Trivedi, 'de Sitter vacua in string theory', Phys. Rev. D 68, 046005 (2003)
